## Description

Provide a detailed summary of the changes made, their business value, and design rationale.

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification & Testing

### Automated Checks
- [ ] All python files compile cleanly: `python -m compileall backend`
- [ ] Seeding script runs twice without errors: `python seed.py`
- [ ] Frontend builds successfully: `npm run build`

### Manual Verification
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions to reproduce.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the PE8 / TS coding standards of this project.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`docs/` or `README.md`) accordingly.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or type errors.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests where necessary.
